core_mechanism: variational (Rayleigh-Ritz/Galerkin) dimensional reduction of a governing field equation: inserting a parameterized trial ansatz into a variational principle to collapse a high-dimensional PDE onto a low-dimensional effective model whose reduced equations govern the ansatz parameters
brief_reason: The abstract reduces the full spatial nonlinear Schrodinger equation to a tractable effective model by employing a variational ansatz based on Laguerre-Gauss modes and deriving explicit variational equations for its parameters.
